semantic.role: Vitest integration test for the ArchSpine CLI sync command using the built executable.
responsibilities: Creates temporary repository fixtures for isolated CLI testing.
Executes the built ArchSpine CLI binary to test sync command behavior.
Validates CLI output and exit codes for correctness.
Cleans up temporary directories after each test run.
outOfScope: Unit testing of individual internal functions.
Mocking the CLI binary or external dependencies.
Testing the CLI development or build process.
invariants: Must use the built CLI binary from the dist directory.
Must run in isolated temporary directories to avoid side effects.
Must be a Vitest test file with suffix .test.ts.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Ensure CLI sync command behaves correctly in an integration environment using the built executable.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Maintain and update CLI integration tests as part of ongoing development (per git status showing modifications).
